brand.name: Online Coaching 4u
brand.tagline: Find the right coaching institute — verified, compared, reviewed.

listings.name: Navjeevan NEET Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Navjeevan NEET Academy is a NEET-focused coaching institute on Piprali Road, Sikar, launched by the Navjeevan Science Group — an education group that has run schools and JEE/defence coaching in Sikar for over 17 years, led by director Shankar Lal Bagaria. The academy operates from SB Tower on Piprali Road, in the heart of Sikar's coaching cluster. On our platform it holds a 5.0 rating from 59 student reviews — the largest review base of any coaching institute in Sikar — and its details are verified with the institute. Being NEET-only, the entire timetable, test series and faculty bench are built around the medical entrance rather than split across exams.
highlights: Backed by Navjeevan Science Group, active in Sikar education for 17+ years
NEET-only focus — no split attention across exams
Largest student review base of any Sikar institute on our platform (59 reviews)

listings.name: Matrix IIT-JEE / NEET Coaching
listings.address: Piprali Rd, opposite Ganpati Plaza, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Matrix Academy, established in 2014, is one of Sikar's strongest JEE institutes, founded by a team of IIT Kharagpur alumni including Anil Gora — 'AG Sir' to students. Its campus sits on Piprali Road opposite Ganpati Plaza. The institute reports more than 6,000 students qualifying JEE Advanced since 2015 and runs a separate NEET division alongside its flagship JEE programs, with foundation batches for younger classes. Students rate it 4.7 from 20 reviews on our platform. Matrix is typically shortlisted by aspirants who want IIT-alumni-led teaching in Sikar without moving to Kota.
highlights: Founded 2014 by IIT Kharagpur alumni, led by Anil Gora (AG Sir)
Institute reports 6,000+ JEE Advanced qualifiers since 2015
Separate NEET division and pre-foundation programs alongside JEE

listings.name: Gurukripa Career Institute (GCI)
listings.address: Jyoti Nagar, Piprali Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
highlights: Multiple campuses across Sikar, Jaipur and Alwar
GSAT scholarship test with up to 100% fee waiver
Foundation courses for classes 6-10 alongside NEET and JEE
Hostel and mess support for outstation students
listings.about: Gurukripa Career Institute (GCI) is Sikar's most established large-scale coaching institute, teaching NEET, IIT-JEE and foundation courses (classes 6–10) since 2007. Its head office is at Jyoti Nagar on Piprali Road, with additional campuses in Jaipur and Alwar. Gurukripa runs its own scholarship test, GSAT, through which students can earn fee waivers of up to 100%, and provides hostel and mess support for the large outstation population it draws from across North India. The listing is verified with the institute and rates 5.0 from 23 student reviews on our platform. For many families comparing Sikar options, GCI is the benchmark the newer institutes measure themselves against.

listings.name: Path Career Institute
listings.address: JK Heights, Piprali Rd, New Janta Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Path Career Institute is Sikar's most talked-about new NEET institute, launched in 2025 at JK Heights on Piprali Road by a group of senior faculty who previously taught at Gurukripa — including biology teachers Bhawani Sir, with over two decades of teaching experience, and DK Sir, with more than twelve years. That ex-GCI lineage is the institute's core pitch: experienced topper-producing faculty in a new, smaller setup where batch access to teachers is easier. Early student response has been strong — 5.0 from 19 reviews on our platform — though as a first-year institute it has no independent results history yet, which aspirants should weigh honestly.
highlights: Founded by senior ex-Gurukripa faculty, including 21+ year biology teacher Bhawani Sir
NEET-only program in a deliberately smaller, high-access setup
New in 2025 — strong early reviews but no independent results history yet

listings.name: PCP (Prince Career Pioneer)
listings.address: Palwas Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
highlights: Produced NEET UG 2024 AIR 1 — Devesh Joshi's perfect 720/720
Part of the Prince Eduhub group, in Sikar education since 1998
Dedicated JEE/NEET campus on Palwas Road since 2009
listings.about: PCP (Prince Career Pioneer) is the JEE/NEET coaching arm of the Prince Eduhub education group, whose roots in Sikar schooling go back to 1998; the PCP coaching campus on Palwas Road has operated since 2009 under director Jogender Sunda. PCP delivered Sikar's biggest result to date: in NEET UG 2024, its student Devesh Joshi scored a perfect 720/720 to take All India Rank 1 — a landmark widely credited with putting Sikar on the national coaching map. Students rate it 4.2 from 10 reviews on our platform. PCP suits aspirants who want a results-proven system attached to one of Sikar's oldest education groups.

listings.name: CLC Institute
listings.address: Pandit Harinath Chaturvedi Marg, Piprali Rd, Railway Station Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: CLC (Career Line Coaching) is the oldest coaching institute in Sikar, founded in 1996 by Er. Shrawan Choudhary — locals often call it the mother of the city's coaching ecosystem, since several of Sikar's institutes trace their faculty lineage to it. From its Piprali Road head office, CLC teaches NEET, JEE (Main & Advanced), Olympiads, NDA and pre-foundation classes, and the institute reports 36 state-first ranks in NEET over its history. It has since expanded with branches in Jaipur, Jodhpur and Alwar. Students rate it 4.5 from 11 reviews on our platform. CLC appeals to families who value three decades of institutional continuity over newer, flashier setups.
highlights: Sikar's oldest coaching institute — teaching since 1996
Founded by Er. Shrawan Choudhary; branches now in Jaipur, Jodhpur and Alwar
Covers NEET, JEE, Olympiads, NDA and pre-foundation under one roof

listings.name: Sri Chaitanya Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Sri Chaitanya Academy's Sikar centre, opened in 2024 in Jat Colony off Piprali Road, brings one of India's largest education groups into the city's coaching market. The Sri Chaitanya group, which originated in Andhra Pradesh and runs one of the country's biggest school-plus-coaching networks, is nationally known for its structured JEE and NEET programs and integrated foundation model. The Sikar campus teaches JEE and NEET batches. As a recent entrant it has only a handful of local reviews so far, so aspirants should judge it on a campus visit and demo class rather than ratings alone.

listings.name: ALLEN Career Institute
listings.address: Near Piprali Circle, Jhunjhunu Bypass, Piprali Rd, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: ALLEN Career Institute's Sikar campus, near Piprali Circle on the Jhunjhunu Bypass, is the local outpost of India's best-known medical and engineering coaching brand, founded in Kota in 1988. The Sikar centre runs classroom programs for JEE and NEET on the same academic system as ALLEN's Kota headquarters — same study material, test series and batch structure. For Sikar students, it offers the ALLEN system without relocation to Kota. Its local review base on our platform is still small, so treat the national brand's reputation and a campus visit as your main evidence.

listings.name: Kalam IAS Academy
listings.address: Nawalgarh Rd, Vision Janta Colony, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Kalam IAS Academy, operating since 2017 from Jat Colony on Nawalgarh Road, prepares Sikar students for civil services and state government exams — IAS, RAS and teaching recruitment tests. It serves aspirants who want structured UPSC/RPSC preparation without moving to Jaipur or Delhi, the usual destinations for civil-services coaching. The institute has not yet accumulated student reviews on our platform; if you have studied here, your review would genuinely help others weigh the option.

listings.name: Inspector SSC Academy
listings.address: Charan Singh Gate, Nawalgarh Rd, Charan Singh Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Inspector SSC Academy, running since 2014 near Charan Singh Gate on Nawalgarh Road, is a government-exam specialist — its batches target SSC, LDC, Police, RAS and Railway recruitment rather than the JEE/NEET mainstream that dominates Sikar. That specialisation matters: government-exam coaching lives on speed drills, current affairs and exam-pattern updates, which generalist academies often under-serve. The institute has no student reviews on our platform yet, so visit, sit in a session, and ask about the test-series schedule before enrolling.

listings.name: Aayaam Career Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, New Janta Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Aayaam Career Academy is a young NEET-focused institute on Piprali Road in New Janta Colony, teaching since 2024. It is one of several compact NEET-only academies that have opened in Sikar as the city's medical-coaching reputation has grown, pitching smaller batches and closer faculty access than the large campuses. Early feedback is positive — 5.0 from its first 3 reviews on our platform — but with a review base this small, a personal visit and demo class should carry more weight than the number.

listings.name: Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy, established in 2017 on Piprali Road, is a JEE-specialist institute — one of the few in Sikar focused on engineering entrance rather than splitting between JEE and NEET. The institute reports more than 800 students qualifying JEE Advanced since 2018. Its listing is verified with the institute, and students rate it 3.8 from 5 reviews on our platform — a mixed early signal worth probing in person: sit in a class, ask current students about faculty stability, and compare against Matrix and Gurukripa's JEE batches before deciding.
highlights: JEE-specialist focus — one of few Sikar institutes not splitting with NEET
Institute reports 800+ JEE Advanced qualifiers since 2018
Verified listing; mixed early ratings worth checking in person

listings.name: Vibrant SSC Academy
listings.address: Choudhary Complex, Nawalgarh Rd, Ram Nagar, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Vibrant SSC Academy has prepared Sikar students for government recruitment exams since 2013 from Choudhary Complex on Nawalgarh Road, Jat Colony. Its programs cover SSC, LDC, Railway, Banking and RAS — the full spread of central and Rajasthan state government exams. A decade of operation makes it one of the more established govt-exam specialists in the city, though it has not yet gathered student reviews on our platform. Ask the academy for its recent selection list and verify a couple of names independently before enrolling — the standard check for this category.

listings.name: PW Vidyapeeth
listings.address: Ward no 39, Samarthpura School, Piprali Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: PW Vidyapeeth Sikar is the offline centre of Physics Wallah — the edtech company that grew from Alakh Pandey's YouTube teaching into one of India's largest education platforms — located on Piprali Road. Vidyapeeth centres pair PW's famously low-fee model with physical classrooms: local faculty handle doubt-solving and discipline while the core lectures and test series ride on PW's national academic system for JEE and NEET. It suits students who want PW's affordability with the structure of a daily classroom, though its Sikar-specific review base on our platform is still tiny.

listings.name: Alpha NDA Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Ghorana Ki Dhani, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Alpha NDA Academy, teaching since 2016 on Piprali Road, is Sikar's defence-exam specialist, preparing students for NDA and CDS alongside civil-services foundations. Defence preparation differs meaningfully from JEE/NEET coaching — SSB interview readiness, physical standards and general-awareness weight — which is why a dedicated academy can out-serve a generalist one for these exams. Students rate it 4.0 from 2 early reviews on our platform; ask specifically about written-exam results and SSB-stage support when you visit.

listings.name: IMS Learning Resources
listings.address: Head office in Mumbai; 90+ centres across 50+ cities in India
listings.about: IMS Learning Resources, founded in Mumbai in 1977, is among India's oldest test-prep institutes and runs roughly 90+ centres across 50+ cities alongside full online CAT programs. Its SimCAT mock series is one of India's most widely taken CAT test series — which matters because percentile benchmarks are only as good as the test-taker pool behind them. The SimCAT 2026 packages go up to 40 full-length mocks with detailed video solutions, 30 sectional tests, and AI-powered performance insights that benchmark you against a national percentile and generate personalised improvement suggestions. Beyond CAT, IMS covers MH-CET, GMAT, GRE, CLAT and IPMAT, and pairs test prep with B-school selection mentoring — a legacy strength from five decades in admissions counselling.
highlights: Founded 1977 — among India's first CAT test-prep institutes
SimCAT 2026: up to 40 full mocks with AI insights and national percentile benchmarking
One of India's largest mock test-taker pools, making percentiles meaningful
90+ centres in 50+ cities plus complete online programs

listings.name: Career Launcher
listings.address: Headquartered in New Delhi; 200+ learning centres across India, Dubai and Abu Dhabi
listings.about: Career Launcher, founded in 1995 by IIM Bangalore alumnus Satya Narayanan R, is one of India's largest test-prep companies, with 200+ learning centres across India plus international centres in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Its CAT 2026 test series packages 30+1 CAT-specific mocks — every mock comes with detailed video solutions and AI-powered performance analysis covering accuracy, topic-wise strengths and improvement areas — plus sectional and topic tests. Classroom, hybrid and online formats run on the same mentor-led model the company is known for, and coverage spans CLAT, IPMAT, CUET, GRE and GMAT alongside CAT. Career Launcher suits aspirants who want a large, established organisation with physical centres to walk into and a mentor attached to their preparation.
highlights: Founded 1995 by IIM Bangalore alumnus Satya Narayanan R
CAT 2026 series: 30+1 mocks, each with video solutions and AI performance analysis
200+ centres across India plus Dubai and Abu Dhabi
Mentor-led model across classroom, hybrid and online formats

listings.name: T.I.M.E. (Triumphant Institute of Management Education)
listings.locality: Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka, Satya Niketan
listings.address: Multiple centres across Delhi, including Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka and Satya Niketan
listings.about: T.I.M.E. (Triumphant Institute of Management Education), founded in 1992, is a pan-India test-prep brand running multiple CAT coaching centres across Delhi — including Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka and Satya Niketan — alongside online and live-class programs. Faculty vary by centre, with senior mentors covering VARC, DILR and Quant, and both weekday and weekend batches are offered; seat availability should be checked directly with the specific centre. A full CAT classroom or online course is generally priced in the range of about ₹50,000–₹75,000 depending on duration, centre and inclusions. Students generally report a positive classroom experience, strong faculty and a well-established test series, though some note that the experience can vary by branch and individual faculty.
highlights: Long-standing brand with a wide branch network across Delhi
Established CAT test series alongside section-wise specialised modules
Comprehensive GD/PI support included
Both weekday and weekend batch options

listings.name: Arun Sharma's Mindworkzz
listings.address: Classroom centre in the Connaught Place area of Delhi, plus online/live courses for students across India
listings.about: Arun Sharma's Mindworkzz is a niche CAT coaching brand built around Arun Sharma, the well-known CAT Quant author, who leads a core team of senior faculty covering Quant, LRDI and VARC — with some sessions taught by Arun Sharma himself. It runs classroom batches from its Delhi centre alongside online/live courses reaching students nationwide, with limited-seat weekday and weekend options. Course fees for a complete CAT program are commonly in the range of about ₹60,000–₹80,000 depending on the mode and inclusions, with smaller specialised batches and doubt sessions also offered. Students frequently praise the Quant training and the quality of practice questions, though some prefer to supplement their verbal preparation with other sources or coaches.
highlights: High focus on Quant, taught with author-curated material
Challenging, rigorously curated problem sets
Targeted coaching aimed at high-percentile aspirants
Limited-seat batches led by a senior, author-led faculty team

listings.name: TathaGat (TG)
listings.address: Classroom centre on Barakhamba Road, Delhi, plus online classes and test-series for students outside Delhi
listings.about: TathaGat (TG), founded in 2007, is a boutique CAT coaching institute known for a student-first approach built around rigorous concept-building, regular homework and frequent interaction between students and faculty. Classroom coaching runs from its Delhi centre on Barakhamba Road, in carefully sized batches, alongside online classes and test-series for students outside Delhi. Course fees are usually in the range of about ₹55,000–₹75,000 depending on the specific program, with batches generally structured as weekday or weekend intensive programs. Students often praise the personal attention, doubt-solving and serious peer group, though limited seats mean batches fill up early — which also keeps class sizes controlled.
highlights: Small batch sizes with personalised attention
Rigorous, frequent question practice
Tightly monitored, closely mentored learning environment
Founder-led team known for close student interaction

listings.name: MBAGuru
listings.locality: Connaught Place, Kailash Colony, Rajouri Garden
listings.address: Multiple centres in Delhi including Connaught Place, Kailash Colony and Rajouri Garden, alongside online adaptive courses
listings.about: MBAGuru is a Delhi-headquartered CAT coaching institute known for its "adaptive" preparation model, which adjusts difficulty and focus based on individual student performance, backed by structured classroom teaching. It runs classroom programs from centres across Delhi — including Connaught Place, Kailash Colony and Rajouri Garden — alongside online adaptive courses and multiple batch options, with mentors described as 99+ percentilers heading different sections. CAT programs generally fall in a range of about ₹60,000–₹75,000, with classroom batches offered in both weekday and weekend modes and separate online batches available. Students often highlight the personalised attention and adaptive approach as positives, while some compare the fees with bigger national brands even as they appreciate the Delhi-centric focus.
highlights: Adaptive prep methodology tailored to individual performance
Relatively smaller batches than large national brands
Detailed performance analytics and regular student feedback
Both classroom (Delhi) and online batch options

listings.name: Alchemist (Alchemist Learning)
listings.address: Centres in Pitampura and Connaught Place, Delhi, with some blended/online support
listings.about: Alchemist (Alchemist Learning) is a Delhi-focused CAT coaching institute positioned around personalised coaching delivered through smaller, mentor-driven batches, with a senior in-house faculty team specialising across Quant, LRDI and VARC. It runs classroom programs from centres in Pitampura and Connaught Place, with some blended and online support, and limited-size batches running through the year. The fee range is usually reported at around ₹60,000–₹90,000 depending on the course depth and duration, with different weekday and weekend batch options offered. Students generally appreciate the personalised atmosphere and direct faculty access, though some consider it a slightly premium-priced option for its boutique positioning.
highlights: Small batch sizes with individual doubt-solving
Mentor-driven teaching model
Emphasis on conceptual clarity over rote practice
Centres in both Pitampura and Connaught Place

listings.name: AnkGanit
listings.address: Classroom centre associated with Connaught Place, Delhi, plus online/live Quant-focused courses
listings.about: AnkGanit is a boutique CAT coaching institute with a clear emphasis on Quantitative Aptitude — reflected in its name — known for focused practice and high-level problem-solving, delivered by a math-focused faculty team with strong Quant backgrounds and structured material supporting the other sections. Classroom coaching runs from its Delhi centre, often associated with Connaught Place, alongside online/live Quant-focused offerings, with limited-size batches and start dates scheduled across the year. The reported fee for full CAT preparation is roughly around ₹40,000, though this may vary with inclusions and timing, and full batch details are shared directly by the centre. Students frequently credit AnkGanit with strengthening their Quant, and many combine it with separate verbal coaching for a more balanced overall CAT preparation strategy.
highlights: Strong specialisation in Quantitative Aptitude
Intensive, high-level problem practice
Personalised doubt-clearing
Focus on building both speed and accuracy

listings.name: Kitabee CAT Preparation
listings.address: Classroom centre in Jhandewalan Extension and nearby areas of Delhi, with online support and test-series
listings.about: Kitabee CAT Preparation is a Delhi-based CAT coaching centre offering full-length classroom programs, test-series and doubt-solving sessions at a relatively accessible price point, taught by classroom faculty experienced in CAT coaching with section-wise mentors for Quant, LRDI and VARC. It runs from a centre in Jhandewalan Extension and nearby areas, with relatively compact weekday and weekend batches, alongside online support and test-series. Course fees are commonly reported at around ₹55,000 for the full program, subject to change, with batch options usually including both weekday and weekend slots. Reviews are generally mixed to positive, with students liking the classroom environment and the affordability compared to some larger brands, aimed at both working professionals and full-time students alike.
highlights: Focus on direct classroom interaction with approachable faculty
Structured test practice and doubt-solving sessions
Relatively accessible pricing versus larger national brands
Batches suited to both working professionals and full-time students

listings.name: Hitbullseye
listings.address: E-305, Phase 8A, Industrial Area, Mohali; centres in Chandigarh, Ludhiana, Patiala, Yamunanagar and Ambala
listings.about: Hitbullseye (Bulls Eye), founded in 1996 by XLRI and IIM alumni and headquartered in Mohali near Chandigarh, runs six physical centres across five North Indian cities and one of the most generous free online portals in Indian test prep — lakhs of aspirants use its free mocks and practice material without ever buying a course. Its paid CAT 2026 test series bundles more than 105 practice tests spanning CAT plus the other MBA entrances (XAT, SNAP, NMAT, IBSAT), now with AI-based performance analytics layered on results. Courses also cover CLAT, IPMAT, banking exams, GRE and GMAT. Hitbullseye works best as either a value-focused main course in North India or a high-volume practice supplement to any other platform.
highlights: Founded 1996 by XLRI and IIM alumni; six centres across North India
105+ practice tests covering CAT, XAT, SNAP, NMAT and IBSAT in one series
AI-based performance analytics on its CAT 2026 test series
One of the largest free mock and practice portals in Indian test prep

listings.name: CATKing Educare
listings.address: Mumbai-based; classroom centres in Mumbai plus live online programs pan-India
listings.about: CATKing Educare is a Mumbai-based MBA coaching institute founded by Sumit Singh Gandhi — an SPJIMR Mumbai PGDM graduate with a B.Tech from NIT Karnataka and Harvard executive education — who still personally teaches the live VARC classes. CATKing runs no franchisees: everything is delivered by the core team, with faculty drawn from IIM, SP Jain, NMIMS and JBIMS alumni. Its CAT 2026 lineup spans Intensive and Turbo courses through to dedicated repeater programs pitched at specific percentile bands, with live lectures, updated e-books and full-length mocks, and course validity extending into 2027 so a two-attempt plan is covered by one purchase. Its strongest differentiator remains Maharashtra depth: MH-CET coverage and non-IIM B-school strategy (SPJIMR, NMIMS, JBIMS) that national platforms treat as an afterthought.
highlights: Founder Sumit Singh Gandhi (SPJIMR) still teaches every live VARC class
No-franchisee model — all programs run directly by the core team
CAT 2026 courses include repeater programs pitched at specific percentile bands
Strongest MH-CET and Maharashtra B-school coverage in the category

listings.name: Rodha
listings.address: Online — YouTube-first CAT preparation, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha — Sanskrit for 'bridge' — is the education platform founded by Ravi Prakash, and its story explains why aspirants trust it. Coming from a middle-class background where coaching fees were a real barrier, Ravi Prakash taught Quant, DI and LR at T.I.M.E. from 2012–16, scored a 99.86 percentile in CAT himself, and then spent a year recording and self-editing 350+ lessons to put a complete CAT course on YouTube, free. That library has grown past 1,400 videos and 424,000 subscribers — the most complete free CAT preparation available anywhere. The paid flagship is genuinely all-inclusive: the comprehensive CAT batch covers every core subject with a dedicated faculty per section (Ravi Prakash on Quant, specialist instructors for LRDI and VARC, with a wider bench including 20-year veteran Krishnendu Dutta), and bundles the full mock series, GD-PI interview preparation, and Rodha Panchayat — personal 1:1 sessions with Rodha mentors — into one enrolment. Rodha reports 30+ students at 99.5+ percentile in CAT 2024 and 90+ converts into BLACKI, XLRI and SPJIMR that year. Mocks are deliberately built 10–15% harder than the real exam on a TCS iON-style interface, so exam day feels easier than practice. Pricing stays well below legacy institutes, and because the entire syllabus is free on YouTube, you can verify the teaching quality completely before spending a rupee.
highlights: 1,400+ free full-syllabus videos on YouTube (424K+ subscribers) — try everything before paying
All-inclusive comprehensive batch: every core subject, full mock series, GD-PI prep and Rodha Panchayat 1:1 mentor sessions in one enrolment
Faculty-per-subject model led by founder Ravi Prakash (99.86 percentile, ex-T.I.M.E.)
Rodha reports 30+ students at 99.5+ percentile and 90+ top B-school converts in CAT 2024
Mocks built 10–15% harder than the real exam on a TCS iON-style interface

ecosystem.name: Rodha CAT (main platform)

listings.name: Rodha IPMAT
listings.address: Online — via ipmat.rodha.co.in and the Rodha IPMAT app, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha IPMAT brings the platform's CAT-proven teaching system to IPMAT, JIPMAT and other BBA entrances — the exams that admit Class 12 students into the five-year integrated management programs at IIM Indore, IIM Rohtak and other IIMs. The vertical carries the same DNA that built Rodha's CAT reputation: live classes scheduled to fit alongside school life, subject specialists (including Sanchit Sir for QA/DILR and Sharwari Ma'am for VARC), personal mentorship, and mock tests engineered to mirror the actual exam. True to the Rodha philosophy, a free starter course and a free mock are available before any payment, and the vertical ships with dedicated Android and iOS apps so younger students can prepare from anywhere. For families weighing an early IIM route after Class 12, Rodha IPMAT offers a rare combination: national-quality faculty at accessible pricing, with the teaching openly sampleable before enrolling.
highlights: Built on Rodha's CAT-proven system — same faculty depth, applied to IPMAT, JIPMAT and BBA entrances
Live classes timed around Class 11–12 school life, with personal mentorship
Free starter course and free mock before any payment

listings.name: Rodha SSC
listings.address: Online — via ssc.rodha.co.in, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha SSC extends the platform's teaching system to government recruitment exams — SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS, CPO and GD — with the accessibility-first approach Rodha is known for. Live classes run bilingually in Hindi and English, opening the door for aspirants from every background, and each class is followed by Rodha Worksheets plus timed topic and module tests pitched at real exam difficulty. The faculty bench is fully subject-specialised: Neeraj Sir on Quantitative Aptitude, Shrikant Sir on Reasoning, Rupal Ma'am on English, and Abhishek Sir and Himanshu Sir on GK and General Science. In keeping with the Rodha model, over 300 classes, strategy sessions and exam-analysis videos are free on YouTube alongside a free starter course — so aspirants can experience the full teaching style before joining a paid batch. Unlike large platforms where an SSC aspirant is one among lakhs, Rodha SSC pairs its structured study plan with personalised mentorship and dedicated doubt support.
highlights: Covers SSC CGL, CHSL, MTS, CPO and GD with a subject-specialised five-teacher bench

listings.name: Rodha CLAT
listings.address: Online — via clat.rodha.co.in, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha CLAT prepares students for CLAT and AILET — the gateways to India's National Law Universities — with a mentor bench most paid programs would envy, offered at a price nobody can argue with: its flagship Neenv Batch for CLAT 2027 is completely free. The batch bundles 300+ hours of live classes across all five sections, 300+ topic-wise practice tests, 20 CLAT-pattern mock tests and 4,000+ curated questions. The mentors are the headline: Divya Kumar Garg (CLAT AIR 60, AILET AIR 17, NLSIU Bangalore, IIM Ahmedabad, ex-McKinsey — mentor to 10,000+ students), Abhishek Dubey (published author with Pearson and Oswal, 12+ years of experience, mentor to AIR 3, 5, 7 and 11, with 500+ students placed in NLUs), Kriti Bhatnagar (NLIU Bhopal, UGC-NET qualified, ex-JGLS faculty) and Ananya Singhal (NLU Odisha, MDI, author of 14 CLAT books). Live sessions run on YouTube with recordings available anytime, and the batch is deliberately structured to run alongside board exam preparation. For CLAT aspirants anywhere in India, this is arguably the most complete free program in the category.
highlights: Flagship Neenv Batch for CLAT 2027 is completely free — 300+ hours of live classes
20 CLAT-pattern mocks, 300+ topic tests and 4,000+ curated questions included

listings.name: Cracku

listings.about: Cracku is an online CAT prep platform founded in 2014 by IIT-IIM alumni and led by Maruti Konduri (IIT Bombay, IIM Ahmedabad) — a five-time CAT 100-percentiler (2019, 2021–2024). Its system is built around free Daily Targets: short VARC, DILR and Quant tests released every day with video solutions recorded by Konduri himself, with streak rewards for consistency. The paid CAT 2026 course adds 25,000+ practice questions arranged as adaptive topic tests that get harder as you answer correctly, live classes, and the DashCAT mock series — 20 national-level full mocks calibrated to real CAT difficulty, 5 gentler 'Headstart' mocks for early prep, and 45 sectional tests, with faculty attempting DashCATs live to demonstrate strategy. Cracku suits self-paced aspirants who want a daily plan and data-heavy practice over classroom timetables.
highlights: Led by five-time CAT 100-percentiler Maruti Konduri (IIT-B + IIM-A)
Free Daily Targets every day with video solutions by the founder

listings.name: iQuanta

listings.about: iQuanta is an online CAT coaching platform founded in 2019 by Indrajeet Singh — the 'Wizard of Quant', who built his reputation solving aspirants' doubts in minutes inside India's largest CAT Facebook community, now over 4 lakh members strong. That community remains its signature: doubt resolution runs 24/7 alongside live concept and application classes with daily 15–30 minute practice quizzes. The CAT 2026 program includes 750+ tests with detailed solutions and a mock series of 20 proctored plus 15 unproctored full-length CATs calibrated to the real exam's difficulty and topic mix. After each mock, an AI analytics engine breaks down accuracy and time per question, estimates your percentile, and even suggests which B-schools your current level is likely to convert. iQuanta has also expanded into IPMAT and CLAT preparation.

Its CAT 2026 lineup is a ladder of batches — from a low-cost Starter Kit through Pioneer, Pro and Elite to the mentorship-heavy Power batch and the Core batch that adds foundation-building for students starting from scratch. Depending on batch, features include two-way interactive live classes, unlimited recorded playback, daily practice problems with video solutions recorded by the teaching faculty, 15,000+ practice questions, hard-copy books, and in the Power batch, 1:1 mentorship. Weekend-only options serve working professionals. MBA Wallah is the natural pick for budget-conscious aspirants who want a full live-class ecosystem at a fraction of legacy-institute pricing.

Access works on two tiers: the Plus subscription covers all live and recorded content, while Iconic adds a personal coach and one-on-one doubt-solving. A meaningful amount of content is free to watch before subscribing. Unacademy's real strength is choice — aspirants can sample several teaching styles and follow the educators that click, all inside one subscription.

listings.about: Addon Skills is a PMI Authorized Training Partner (ATP) based in Pune, India, offering certification prep across PMP, PgMP, PfMP, PMI-RMP and CAPM. Its cohorts run as instructor-led virtual live classes (ILVC) on weekends, taught by credentialed trainers — including Dr. Shri Rajagopalan for PMP and Ishpinder Kailey, a PMP/PgMP/PfMP holder with 15+ years of experience, for the program and portfolio management tracks. Beyond live training, Addon Skills offers application-writing support, an exam-simulation tool, self-paced learning and corporate/team training, alongside PDU courses for certification renewal. As an official PMI ATP, its course content is directly aligned with PMI's exam content outline rather than independently developed.
highlights: Official PMI Authorized Training Partner (ATP), based in Pune, India
Covers five PMI credentials: PMP, PgMP, PfMP, PMI-RMP and CAPM
Weekend instructor-led virtual cohorts plus self-paced learning, exam simulator and application-writing support

listings.name: iZenBridge Consultancy
listings.address: Online — live virtual and classroom-style training delivered worldwide; headquartered in Sector 48, Gurugram, Haryana
listings.about: iZenBridge is a Gurugram-based training provider founded in 2012 by Saket Bansal, who has personally trained more than 15,000 professionals across PMP, PgMP, PfMP and Agile certifications. The company holds Premium Authorized Training Partner (ATP) status with PMI, meaning its course content is directly aligned with PMI's official exam content outlines rather than independently developed. Its PgMP and PfMP tracks run as structured mentoring cohorts aimed at senior program and portfolio managers, backed by mock exams, application-review support and a money-back guarantee on select PMP batches. Unlike broader IT-bootcamp platforms that treat PMP as one course among hundreds, iZenBridge's training bench is built specifically around PMI's leadership-tier credentials.
highlights: Premium Authorized Training Partner (ATP) of PMI
Founder Saket Bansal has personally trained 15,000+ professionals across PMP, PgMP and PfMP
Money-back guarantee offered on select PMP batches

listings.name: ProThoughts Solutions
listings.address: JVLR, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400060 — live virtual cohorts delivered pan-India, with a second campus in Magarpatta City, Pune
listings.about: ProThoughts Solutions is a Mumbai-headquartered training provider that began offering PMP preparation in 2014 and has since grown into one of India's larger project-management training brands, with a second campus in Pune's Magarpatta City. It holds Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP) status with PMI and runs live instructor-led online batches across PMP, PgMP and PfMP, alongside corporate and in-house training for enterprise teams. The company markets itself on India-focused delivery — trainers familiar with Indian professionals' work schedules and exam-preparation habits — rather than the global, self-paced catalogue approach of larger bootcamp platforms.
highlights: Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP) of PMI
Campuses in Mumbai and Pune, with live online batches delivered pan-India
Covers PMP, PgMP and PfMP alongside corporate/in-house training

listings.name: KnowledgeHut (upGrad)
listings.address: 10, Reliable Plaza, 14th Main Road, Sector 5, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560102 — live online cohorts delivered pan-India and internationally
listings.about: KnowledgeHut, now part of the upGrad group, is a Bengaluru-headquartered professional training platform founded in 2011 that has grown into one of India's largest bootcamp-style certification providers, spanning technology, data and project management. It holds Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP) status with PMI and runs its PMP program under Program Director Kevin Davis, who brings over two decades of project-management experience, delivering 36 contact hours of live instructor-led sessions plus practice exams and application assistance. As a generalist platform with hundreds of courses beyond project management, KnowledgeHut suits learners who want PMP prep bundled with a broader upskilling ecosystem rather than a boutique, PM-only provider.
highlights: Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP) of PMI, now part of the upGrad group
PMP program led by Program Director Kevin Davis, 20+ years of PM experience
36 contact hours of live instructor-led sessions with practice exams included

listings.name: Koenig Solutions
listings.address: DSM-640-641, 6th Floor, DLF Towers Shivaji Marg, Moti Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi 110015 — live online training delivered across 13 countries
listings.about: Koenig Solutions is a New Delhi-headquartered IT training company founded in 1993, with training operations spanning 13 countries — making it one of the longer-established names on this list, though its roots are in broad enterprise IT training rather than project management specifically. It is a PMI Authorized Training Partner and runs certification tracks for PMP and PfMP alongside its much larger catalogue of cloud, cybersecurity and software courses. Learners who want PMP training paired with a vendor also known for cloud and infrastructure certifications may find Koenig's scale useful; those seeking a PM-focused faculty bench may prefer a specialist provider instead.
highlights: PMI Authorized Training Partner, operating in 13 countries since 1993
Covers both PMP and PfMP alongside a much wider IT-certification catalogue
One of the longest-established general IT training companies on this list

listings.name: Simplilearn
listings.address: No. 53, NALANDA, Manoj Arcade, 24th Main Rd, Sector 2, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560102 — live online cohorts delivered worldwide
listings.about: Simplilearn, founded in 2010 and dual-headquartered in San Francisco and Bengaluru, is among the largest online bootcamp platforms in the world, offering certification training across technology, data and management disciplines. It holds PMI Premier Partner status and its PMP course is one of its best-selling programs, combining live virtual classes with self-paced video content, practice tests and application-filing support. As a large, well-funded platform, Simplilearn's PMP batches run on scale — frequent cohort start dates and a large trainer pool — rather than the boutique cohort sizes of specialist PM-training firms, which is worth weighing if personalised faculty access matters to you.
highlights: PMI Premier Partner; PMP is one of its flagship certification programs
Founded 2010, dual-headquartered in San Francisco and Bengaluru
Blended format: live virtual classes plus self-paced video and practice tests

listings.name: Invensis Learning
listings.address: 34/1 Upkar Chambers, RV Road, Basavangudi, Bengaluru, Karnataka — live online training delivered across 100+ locations worldwide
listings.about: Invensis Learning is the training and certification division of Bengaluru-based Invensis, offering courses across project management, IT service management, Agile and quality management in more than 100 locations worldwide. It holds PMI Authorized Training Partner status (ATP ID 4177) and runs certification programs for PMP, CAPM and PMI-RMP through live virtual classrooms, alongside a considerably larger catalogue of ITIL, PRINCE2 and Six Sigma courses. Invensis suits professionals who want PMP training from a provider with an established global training footprint rather than a project-management-only specialist.
highlights: PMI Authorized Training Partner (ATP ID 4177)
Delivers training across 100+ locations worldwide, spanning PM, ITSM and quality management
Covers PMP, CAPM and PMI-RMP certification tracks

listings.name: Henry Harvin
listings.address: Henry Harvin House, B-12, B Block, Sector 6, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301 — live online cohorts delivered pan-India and internationally
listings.about: Henry Harvin is a Noida-headquartered upskilling company founded in 2013 by Kounal Gupta, who started the venture at 19 and has since grown it into a global training brand offering more than 1,200 courses across 37+ categories. It holds Premier Authorized Training Partner status with PMI and its PMP course runs as an 8-to-12-week program combining 36 hours of live training with internship-style projects and interview preparation, alongside a separate PMI-RMP track for risk-management specialists. As a broad-catalogue upskilling platform rather than a PM-only specialist, Henry Harvin bundles PMP training with placement-style extras — bootcamps, resume support — that dedicated PM training firms typically don't offer.
highlights: Premier Authorized Training Partner (ATP) of PMI
Founded 2013 by Kounal Gupta; now runs 1,200+ courses across 37+ categories
PMP course bundles 36 hours of live training with internship-style projects and interview prep

listings.name: Vinsys
listings.address: CTS No 458A, Tejas Housing Society, Shivaji Niketan, near Mantri Park, Kothrud, Pune, Maharashtra — live online training delivered pan-India and internationally
listings.about: Vinsys is a Pune-headquartered training and consultancy company with a track record stretching back to the late 1990s, founded by Vikrant Patil out of an earlier Aptech Computer Education franchise. It is a PMI Authorized Training Partner and Global Registered Education Provider (R.E.P.), running certification programs across PMP, PgMP and PMI-RMP through live virtual and classroom batches, alongside a large IT and corporate-training catalogue. Vinsys also has a listed presence on the NSE and offices across the Middle East, Southeast Asia and East Africa — useful for professionals who may relocate internationally mid-career and want a training provider with matching global reach.
highlights: PMI Authorized Training Partner and Global Registered Education Provider (R.E.P.)
Track record stretching back to the late 1990s; publicly listed on the NSE since 2023
Covers PMP, PgMP and PMI-RMP, with offices spanning the Middle East, Southeast Asia and East Africa

listings.name: Edureka
listings.address: 4th Floor, 38/4, Outer Ring Rd, Doddanekundi, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560048 — live online cohorts delivered pan-India and internationally
listings.about: Edureka, operated by Brain4ce Education Solutions, is a Bengaluru-based online learning platform founded in 2011 by Kapil Tyagi, Lovleen Bhatia and Vineet Chaturvedi, initially built around technology upskilling before expanding into project-management certification. It holds PMI Authorized Training Partner status and its PMP course follows PMI's official exam-preparation roadmap, delivered through live online classes with recorded backups and round-the-clock doubt-support access. Edureka was acquired by SNVA Veranda in October 2025, giving it backing from a larger listed education group while continuing to operate its original brand and course catalogue.
highlights: PMI Authorized Training Partner; PMP course follows PMI's official exam-prep roadmap
Founded 2011 as Brain4ce Education Solutions; acquired by SNVA Veranda in October 2025
Live online classes with recorded backups and round-the-clock doubt support

listings.name: 2IIM
listings.address: 19/43, MG Chakrapani St, Sathya Garden, Saligramam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600093 (a Fermat Education initiative; classroom batches also run from Anna Nagar, Chennai)
listings.about: 2IIM (styled 2iim, a Fermat Education initiative) is a Chennai-founded CAT-prep brand started in 2001 by K.S. ‘Baskar’ Baskar (IIM Calcutta) under the earlier name Ascent Education, with Rajesh Balasubramanian (IIT Madras, IIM Bangalore) joining as faculty in 2003 and later becoming its public face — he reports a 100th-percentile CAT score across five different years (2011, 2012, 2014, 2017 and 2023). The teaching style leans on short, screen-capture-style videos that build concepts from first principles rather than long lecture recordings, delivered across three formats: Live Online, Self-Paced, and a Chennai classroom batch at Anna Nagar. Course inclusions run to 30 original full-length mocks plus previous-year papers reformatted as mocks, 8,000+ practice questions, and physical books couriered with the Live Online package. 2IIM publishes its pricing on-site rather than gating it behind a sales call, though we found two different price tables live on its own homepage at the same time — confirm the current fee directly with 2IIM before paying.
highlights: Faculty face Rajesh Balasubramanian reports a 100th-percentile CAT score in five separate years
Fundamentals-first teaching style using short screen-capture videos
Three formats: Live Online, Self-Paced, and Chennai classroom (Anna Nagar)
30 original mocks plus past-year papers reformatted as additional mocks

listings.name: Aarambh Academy
listings.address: Online-only — no physical centre publicly listed
listings.about: Aarambh Academy is a CAT-prep venture launched in 2025 by three individual educators — Raman Tiwari (Quantitative Aptitude), Lokesh Sharma (VARC) and Sameer Sardana (DILR) — who together market roughly 45–50 years of combined prior teaching experience, though the academy itself has no multi-year track record of its own yet. Its flagship CAT 2026 batch bundles live classes, a 10,000+ question practice vault, weekly subject-wise doubt sessions, 105 sectional tests and 20 full-length mocks (branded Aarambh Mocks), plus a bundled Career Launcher test series and OMET coverage for XAT, SNAP and CMAT. As a sub-one-year-old brand, it has no independent Google or Reddit reputation history yet and no publicly listed physical address, so we're treating its ‘10,000+ successful students’ homepage claim with real caution — it almost certainly reflects the founders’ combined prior careers rather than results achieved under the Aarambh Academy name itself.
highlights: Founded 2025 by three educators with a combined ~45-50 years of prior teaching experience
Flagship batch includes 105 sectional tests + 20 full-length Aarambh Mocks
Bundled third-party Career Launcher test series included in the flagship batch
Online-only, with no independent review history yet given its recent launch

listings.name: Vinex Institute
listings.address: 47/11-21/1, Iswarya Complex, 1st Lane, Dwaraka Nagar, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: Vinex Institute is a Dwaraka Nagar coaching centre in Visakhapatnam offering CA Intermediate and Final classes alongside Bank exam and Company Secretary tuitions. It operates under the wider Vinex brand, which has been active in Vizag's coaching scene since 1997, historically best known for IIT-JEE and NEET preparation before adding a dedicated CA vertical. Classes combine in-person teaching with online mock-test access for CA aspirants.
highlights: Part of the Vinex brand, active in Vizag coaching since 1997
Covers CA Inter and Final alongside Bank exam and CS tuitions
Classroom teaching backed by an online mock-test series

listings.name: Accounting Minds
listings.address: 3rd Floor, Vijaya Sales Building, 46-15-44, Mandavaripeta, Dondaparthy, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: Accounting Minds is a Dondaparthy-based coaching centre in Visakhapatnam focused on CA, CMA and CS professional-qualification coaching. It runs both in-person and online class formats, which makes batches accessible to students who can't attend campus daily. It's one of the higher-rated finance-coaching options for Vizag on local business directories, though it maintains a Facebook presence rather than a dedicated website.
highlights: Covers CA, CMA and CS under one roof
Flexible in-person and online class formats
Consistently high ratings on local directories

listings.name: Master Minds (Vizag)
listings.address: 1-104-27, Sanitizer Mansion, AQJ College Road, MVP Colony, Daba Gardens, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530017
listings.about: Master Minds is the Visakhapatnam branch network of a CA coaching chain founded in 2002 in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The Vizag presence spans multiple locations across the city, including Daba Gardens, CBM Compound and Gajuwaka, offering CA Foundation, Intermediate and Final coaching. As a branch of one of Andhra Pradesh's larger multi-city CA coaching operators, it draws on a shared curriculum and study-material bank used across all Master Minds centres.
highlights: Branch of a CA coaching chain founded 2002 in Guntur
Multiple branches within Visakhapatnam city
Shares curriculum and study material with the wider Master Minds network

listings.name: APEX Institute
listings.address: D.No. 9-17-4, Plot No. 36, Amar Nagar, Asilmetta, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530013
listings.about: APEX Institute is a CAT/MBA-entrance coaching institute in Asilmetta, Visakhapatnam, founded in 2015 by Suraj Chawla. It markets itself as a single-focus CAT and MBA-entrance institute rather than a generalist coaching centre, running both classroom batches and an online course platform. Its Google listing shows a strong rating, though it is still built on a small number of reviews, so it's worth confirming current batch strength directly before enrolling.
highlights: Founded 2015, focused solely on CAT/MBA-entrance coaching
Runs both classroom batches and an online course platform
Also covers XAT, GRE and campus-recruitment aptitude prep

listings.name: T.I.M.E. Visakhapatnam
listings.address: 47-13-6, First Floor, near Diamond Park, Sankara Matam Road, Dwaraka Nagar, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: T.I.M.E. (Triumphant Institute of Management Education) Visakhapatnam is the local branch of one of India's largest and longest-running MBA-entrance coaching chains, located on Sankara Matam Road in Dwaraka Nagar. Alongside its core CAT/MBA-entrance programs, the branch also offers CLAT, IPMAT, SSC and bank-exam coaching under the same roof, following the standard multi-exam format T.I.M.E. runs nationally.
highlights: Local branch of the pan-India T.I.M.E. coaching chain
Offers CAT, CLAT, IPMAT and SSC coaching at one centre
Part of a chain with decades of MBA-entrance coaching experience

listings.name: George Prep
listings.address: D.No. 48-3-32, Day and Night Hospital Road, Sri Nagar, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: George Prep is a CAT/MBA-entrance coaching institute in Sri Nagar, Visakhapatnam, founded in 2013. It runs both classroom and online coaching formats, taught by faculty who market their teaching around IIM-alumni credentials, and combines recorded concept videos with in-person mentoring. It carries one of the larger review counts among local Vizag CAT-coaching options.
highlights: Founded 2013, dedicated CAT/MBA-entrance coaching
Combines classroom mentoring with online concept videos
One of the more reviewed CAT institutes in Vizag

listings.name: Adari Institute
listings.address: 4th Floor, Varanasi Majestic, opposite Pizza Hut, Dwaraka Nagar, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: Adari Institute is a Dwaraka Nagar coaching centre in Visakhapatnam that has been operating since 2012, covering an unusually wide spread of competitive exams under one roof: CLAT, CAT, MAT, ICET, Bank, SSC, RRB, AFCAT and IIT-JEE foundation. Rather than specialising in a single exam, it positions itself as a one-stop coaching option for Vizag students preparing for management, law or government-service entrance exams.
highlights: Operating since 2012 in Dwaraka Nagar
One of the few Vizag institutes offering dedicated CLAT preparation
Also covers CAT, IPMAT, SSC, Bank and RRB under one roof

listings.name: Thinkplus Education
listings.address: 45-56-03/5/4, near Axis Bank, Narasimha Nagar, Akkayyapalem, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530024
listings.about: Thinkplus Education is an Akkayyapalem coaching institute in Visakhapatnam founded in 2022 by a group of IIM Udaipur graduates, registered as a private limited company. It runs a combined CLAT, CAT and IPMAT preparation program, positioning itself around IIM-alumni-led instruction rather than splitting into separate single-exam batches.
highlights: Founded 2022 by a group of IIM Udaipur alumni
Registered as a private limited company
Combined CLAT, CAT and IPMAT preparation track

listings.name: VSHRESHTA Academy
listings.address: 45-58/5/14/2, Narasimha Nagar, Port Stadium Area, Akkayyapalem, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh 530016
listings.about: VSHRESHTA Academy is an Akkayyapalem coaching institute in Visakhapatnam running dedicated CLAT and IPMAT preparation tracks alongside its core UPSC/IAS coaching program. It holds one of the highest review volumes among local law and management-entrance coaching centres in the city. Claims of past placement numbers are self-reported by the institute and worth confirming independently before enrolling.
highlights: Dedicated CLAT and IPMAT tracks alongside UPSC/IAS coaching
High review volume relative to other local law-entrance options
Based in the Akkayyapalem/Port Stadium area

listings.address: Seethammadhara, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh
listings.about: RAO'S Academy is a Seethammadhara-based coaching institute in Visakhapatnam, founded in 2017 by Rama Rao, offering IPMAT preparation alongside CLAT, UPSC and various government-exam coaching tracks. Independent Google/Justdial review data for this institute is thin, so it's worth confirming current batch details directly before enrolling.
highlights: Founded 2017, covers IPMAT, CLAT and UPSC coaching
Offers both offline classroom and online course options
One of the few local options with a dedicated IPMAT track

It operates seven days a week and runs a daily mock-test program branded as its 'Real Intensive Program'. Review ratings for IACE vary noticeably between directories, so it's worth checking its current Google Maps listing directly before enrolling.
highlights: Dedicated SSC and banking-exam coaching, not a generalist institute
Open seven days a week with daily mock tests
Runs a structured 'Real Intensive Program' for exam practice

listings.about: Victory Study Circle is a Dwaraka Nagar coaching centre in Visakhapatnam focused on SSC and general competitive-exam preparation. Reviews across multiple platforms consistently single out the quality of its class notes and current-affairs/GK material as a strength. It's open seven days a week, with shorter hours on Sundays.
highlights: Consistently praised across reviews for class-notes and GK material
Open seven days a week
Focused specifically on SSC and general competitive exams

highlights: Covers SSC alongside Bank, Railways and Defence/Police exams
Notable focus on physical-fitness prep for Defence/Police recruitment
Gajuwaka's primary local competitive-exam coaching option

Reviews specifically highlight the strength of its general-studies and current-affairs faculty, along with an on-site library.
highlights: Standalone centre, not part of a multi-city chain
Reviews highlight strong general-studies/current-affairs faculty
Has an on-site library facility for students

Covers CA, CS and CMA under one institute

Offers CAT, CLAT, IPM and SSC coaching at one Vijayanagar centre
Classroom and online course formats available

It's part of India's Triumphant Institute of Management Education network, one of the country's largest exam-coaching chains, and its Vijayanagar centre carries a 4.5-star Justdial rating from 163 reviews. It runs classroom, online and correspondence formats, along with its pan-India AIMCAT mock-test series.
highlights: Two centres in Mysuru: Lakshmipuram and Vijayanagar
Part of the pan-India T.I.M.E. coaching network
Runs the AIMCAT mock-test series benchmarked nationally

highlights: Branch of the 40+ year-old IMS Learning Resources network
Runs tiered 'CATapult' program structure for CAT prep
Classroom, online and correspondence formats available

highlights: One location covering CAT, CLAT, IPM and SSC/Bank PO

Local centre led by an NIT Jalandhar engineering graduate

Not-for-profit positioning, unlike most for-profit coaching chains

Confirmed Mysuru branch via the chain's official centre locator

coaching-sikar.intro: Sikar, in Rajasthan's Shekhawati region, has grown into one of India's fastest-rising coaching destinations — a serious alternative to Kota for NEET and JEE preparation at meaningfully lower fees and living costs. The city's institutes cluster along Piprali Road and Nawalgarh Road, surrounded by hostels, libraries and mess facilities built for its large outstation student population. Sikar's breakout moment came in 2024, when a student of the city's PCP institute scored a perfect 720/720 in NEET UG to take All India Rank 1. Beyond JEE and NEET, the city also hosts specialist academies for SSC, defence (NDA/CDS) and civil-services preparation. Every listing below shows its verification status and unedited student ratings.

faqs.q: Which is the best NEET coaching in Sikar?
faqs.a: By student ratings on our platform, Navjeevan NEET Academy (5.0 from 59 reviews) and Gurukripa Career Institute (5.0 from 23 reviews, running since 2007) lead, with Path Career Institute (5.0 from 19 reviews, founded 2025 by senior ex-Gurukripa faculty) the strongest new entrant. PCP, whose student scored NEET 2024's perfect 720/720 AIR 1, is the city's most results-proven name. Visit your top two before deciding — ratings are a screen, not a verdict.

faqs.q: Which is the best JEE coaching in Sikar?
faqs.a: Matrix Academy (founded 2014 by IIT Kharagpur alumni, 4.7 rating) and Gurukripa (since 2007) have the city's strongest JEE track records; Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy is the notable JEE-specialist. CLC, teaching since 1996, and national brands ALLEN and PW Vidyapeeth also run JEE batches in Sikar.

faqs.q: Is Sikar better than Kota for NEET preparation?
faqs.a: It depends on the student. Kota offers unmatched scale and competition density; Sikar offers lower costs, smaller batches and closer faculty access, with results that now compete at the top (NEET 2024's AIR 1 came from Sikar). Self-driven students often prefer Kota's ecosystem; students who benefit from supervision and a calmer environment often do better in Sikar.

coaching-bengaluru.intro: Bengaluru is one of South India's biggest hubs for CA coaching, with established names clustered around Basavanagudi, Koramangala, Malleshwaram, Jayanagar and Vijayanagar. The city offers everything from decades-old institutes like Yeshas Academy (running since 2004) to fast-growing, tech-enabled brands like ArivuPro Academy that blend online, offline and recorded classes. Institutes here typically cover the full CA Foundation-to-Final journey, often alongside CS, CMA and ACCA, giving Bengaluru's large commerce-student population a wide choice of formats and price points.

coaching-chennai.intro: Chennai is the historical home of several of South India's best-known CA coaching brands, including KS Academy, RR Academy and Sreeram Coaching Point — the latter two tracing back three decades or more. The city's institutes are known for structured, exam-focused teaching, weekly test series and, in some cases, claimed all-India rank results. Chennai-founded brands like KS Academy have since expanded into Coimbatore, Bengaluru and Hyderabad, making the city something of a training ground for South India's CA coaching ecosystem.

coaching-hyderabad.intro: Hyderabad's CA coaching scene is anchored by large, multi-program institutes such as CMS for CA, which combines CA and CMA coaching with integrated junior-college and entrance-exam programs. Branches of multi-city brands like KS Academy and Master Minds (Guntur-origin) add further choice, with formats ranging from full offline campuses to online and recorded classes. The city serves a large regional student base across Telangana, with institutes competing on faculty depth, study material and structured mock-test cycles.

coaching-visakhapatnam.intro: Visakhapatnam has fewer dedicated, purely local CA institutes than cities like Chennai or Bengaluru, so online and hybrid options play an outsized role for students here. National online brands like JK Shah Online (founded 1983) and city-specific pages from institutes like Parag Gupta Classes give Vizag students access to established faculty without needing to relocate, while Chennai-based Srinivasa Academy offers a hybrid alternative. Students in the city typically weigh online-brand trust and recorded-lecture quality alongside occasional offline options.

coaching-kochi.intro: Kochi is home to some of Kerala's largest commerce coaching networks, led by Logic School of Management, which claims over 80 branches statewide from its Palarivattom head office. Alongside it, Triple i Commerce Academy and the CA arm of the well-known Xylem Learning platform give Kochi students a mix of traditional classroom coaching and app-based, video-first learning. The city's institutes generally cover CA alongside CS, CMA (India and USA) and ACCA, reflecting Kerala's broad commerce-education demand.

coaching-thiruvananthapuram.intro: Thiruvananthapuram's CA coaching options include branch extensions of major Kerala-wide brands — Logic School of Management and ArivuPro Academy Trivandrum — alongside Kerala-focused specialists like Rank Centre for CA, which has over 20 years of dedicated CA-only coaching experience. The city's students benefit from the same broad course spread (CA, CS, CMA, ACCA) found in Kochi, delivered through a mix of centre-led and online formats.

coaching-coimbatore.intro: Coimbatore's CA coaching lineup includes the local branch of the multi-city KS Academy brand, alongside independent institutes like PR Academy and ARA Education, both of which also provide hostel facilities for the city's significant outstation-student population. Institutes here generally offer the full CA Foundation-to-Final track, often bundled with CMA or ACCA, and the city's coaching cluster has built a reputation for personalised, industry-experienced faculty attention.

coaching-mysuru.intro: Mysuru's CA coaching market leans heavily on Bengaluru-based brands extending their reach into the city — SuccessEdge Academy Mysore and ArivuPro Academy both serve Mysuru students primarily through online delivery backed by nearby Bengaluru centres. Locally, ProTree Academy stands out as a dedicated Mysuru-based CA and CS academy with an active, frequently updated blog. Together, these options give Mysuru students a mix of local and online-extended CA coaching choices.

faqs.q: Which is the best online CAT coaching in India for 2026?
faqs.a: Rodha stands out as the only platform with its complete CAT syllabus (1,400+ videos) free on YouTube, so you can verify the teaching quality before paying anything; its paid batches and harder-than-CAT mock series stay cheaper than legacy institutes. Strong alternatives by need: Cracku for app-based daily-target prep by a five-time 100-percentiler, iQuanta for 24/7 doubt support, and IMS for India's most widely taken mock series (SimCAT).

faqs.q: Which online CAT coaching is free or cheapest?
faqs.a: Rodha offers the most complete free preparation — its entire video syllabus is on YouTube, plus free full-length and sectional mocks with video solutions. Cracku's Daily Targets are free every day with video solutions. Hitbullseye runs one of the largest free practice portals. Among paid full courses, MBA Wallah (Physics Wallah) and Rodha are typically the most affordable.

faqs.q: Which CAT mock test series should I take for CAT 2026?
faqs.a: IMS SimCAT has India's largest test-taker pool, which makes its percentiles the most meaningful benchmark. Rodha's mocks are deliberately 10–15% harder than the real exam on a TCS iON-style interface — good for building endurance. Cracku's 20 DashCATs and iQuanta's 35 mocks with AI analytics are also credible. Serious aspirants often combine two series in the final months.

faqs.q: Is online coaching enough to crack CAT?
faqs.a: Yes — online-prepared students score 99+ percentiles every year, and CAT itself is a computer-based exam, so online mock practice transfers directly. The trade-off is accountability: classroom programs impose structure, while online prep demands self-discipline. Platforms compensate with daily targets (Cracku), 24/7 communities (iQuanta) and fixed live schedules (Rodha, MBA Wallah).
